creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-bugs->jasone

Even though jasone has no currentl plans to import the latest version 
of jemalloc which incorporates something similar to this patch, assign 
it to him as principle jemalloc maintainer.  If some other committer 
pulls in the patch from upstream, please take this PR.  Thanks.
